def process_order(order_id):
    from myapp.services.payment import PaymentProcessor
    from myapp.services.inventory import InventoryManager

    processor = PaymentProcessor()
    manager = InventoryManager()
    processor.charge(order_id)
    manager.reserve(order_id)


def build_report(user_id):
    from myapp.services.analytics import AnalyticsEngine
    from myapp.services.export import ReportExporter

    engine = AnalyticsEngine()
    exporter = ReportExporter()
    data = engine.compute(user_id)
    return exporter.to_pdf(data)


def handle_webhook(event):
    from myapp.integrations.slack import SlackNotifier
    from myapp.integrations.email import EmailService

    slack = SlackNotifier()
    email = EmailService()
    slack.notify(event)
    email.send_alert(event)


def sync_user_data(user_id):
    from myapp.adapters.crm import CRMAdapter
    from myapp.adapters.caching import CacheAdapter

    crm = CRMAdapter()
    cache = CacheAdapter()
    data = crm.fetch(user_id)
    cache.set(f"user:{user_id}", data)
